title: notholithocarpus densiflorus var. echinoides
intro: Notholithocarpus densiflorus var. echinoides, also known as the coastal scrub incense cedar or incense cedar, is a variety of coniferous shrub native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. This plant contains essential oils with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including coughs, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Notholithocarpus densiflorus var. echinoides include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, tinctures, and infused teas, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
